<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

---

<!-- Explain why this feature would be useful -->
<!-- What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- What use cases does it enable? -->

---

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->
<!-- Include technical details if you have specific ideas -->

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered alternative approaches? -->
<!-- What are the pros and cons of different solutions? -->
<!-- Delete this section if not applicable -->

---

## 📊 Expected Benefits

<!-- Describe the expected benefits of implementing this feature -->
<!-- Use checkboxes for clarity -->
<!-- Example:
- ✅ Improved performance for large maps
- ✅ Better compatibility with Tool X
- ✅ Simplified user workflow
-->

---

## 🖼️ Examples/Mockups

<!-- Use code blocks for examples:
```python
# Example usage

```
-->

---

## ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes

<!-- Will this feature introduce any breaking changes? -->
<!-- If yes, describe them and suggest migration strategies -->
<!-- If no, write "None expected" -->

**None expected**

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or references -->
<!-- E.g., similar features in other tools, related issues, academic papers -->

---

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Please check the following before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have clearly described the motivation
- [ ] I have considered potential breaking changes
- [ ] I have provided use case examples
